entities.description: vdd 5v0 main is a power supply provided by the evaluation board for peripheral circuits
vdd 3v3 main is a power supply provided by the evaluation board for peripheral circuits
vdd 1v8 main is a power supply provided by the evaluation board for peripheral circuits
vdd 3v3 som output is a power supply that enables the three power lines for the evaluation board s peripheral circuits
evaluation board is a device that provides power supplies for peripheral circuits and controls the timing of the core board s power up

relations.description: vdd 5v0 main is a power supply provided by the evaluation board
vdd 3v3 main is a power supply provided by the evaluation board
vdd 1v8 main is a power supply provided by the evaluation board
vdd 5v0 main is enabled by vdd 3v3 som output
vdd 3v3 main is enabled by vdd 3v3 som output
vdd 1v8 main is enabled by vdd 3v3 som output
vdd 3v3 som output enables the three power lines provided by the evaluation board
